all certificates

Certificate archive.

Featured and regular certificates are collected here. Featured items are marked directly on the card.

Featured Attendance Certificate
25 April 2026

Dicoding Developer Conference 2026

Dicoding Indonesia

Attendance certificate for participating in Dicoding Developer Conference 2026 organized by Dicoding Indonesia. This certificate reflects active involvement in a developer-focused event covering technology, learning, and industry insight.
Featured Bootcamp Certificate
25 August 2022

Flutter E-commerce Bootcamp

Android Enthusiast Jakarta

Certificate of completion for passing the Flutter E-commerce Bootcamp organized by Android Enthusiast Jakarta. This certificate reflects structured hands-on learning in building Flutter applications around e-commerce use cases.
